user.title: Vigil
user.description: Configure how Vigil watches your integrations, devices, and entities for health issues.

data.recorder_lookback_days: Recorder lookback days (0 = auto, match recorder retention)
data.availability_ignored_platforms: Annotation platforms ignored for availability (metadata that stays online when the device is offline)

data_description.interval_store_url: Optional SQLAlchemy URL to persist learned intervals in an external database over a Vigil-owned connection, separate from the recorder — e.g. mysql+pymysql://user:password@host/dbname. Leave blank to use the default local SQLite file.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one Vigil instance is allowed.
